commands.review_summary:
The PR folds existing HTTP/API script proof into QA Lab scenario YAML and moves the related Vitest evidence paths under `test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime`, updating changed-test routing accordingly.

PR surface: Tests -1, Other +158. Total +157 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a QA/test fold, not a bug report. Source inspection confirms current main supports native Vitest scenarios and the branch points moved scripts to those scenarios.

target.title: test: fold HTTP API script proof into QA Lab
target.body:
## Summary

- Fold the OpenAI-compatible chat tools, OpenAI web_search minimal, native web_search assertion, and OpenWebUI probe script tests into QA Lab native evidence paths.
- Add QA scenario YAML entries for the folded HTTP/API proof so taxonomy coverage fulfills `gateway.openai-compatible-apis`, `runtime.reasoning-and-cache-controls`, `web-search.openai-native-web-search`, and `plugins.web-search-and-fetch`, with secondary hosted tool-use evidence.
- Update changed-test routing so edits to the existing Docker/client scripts run the new QA Lab evidence files.
- Keep the Docker profile/build ordering guard and native Vitest evidence out of runtime parity tier selection.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal-assertions.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-node.mjs qa coverage --json --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-conflict-fix-2.json`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-web-search-native-assertions.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openwebui-openai-compatible.yaml test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal-assertions.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: HTTP/API script proof is now represented as QA Lab scenario evidence with primary taxonomy IDs instead of only living under `test/scripts`.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout on this branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Focused Vitest commands listed above, QA coverage report command listed above, oxfmt checks, whitespace check, and branch autoreview.

Evidence after fix: QA coverage report returned 128 scenarios, 171 coverage IDs, 105 primary coverage IDs, and 0 scorecard `*-not-found` issues. The target dotted IDs `gateway.openai-compatible-apis`, `runtime.reasoning-and-cache-controls`, `web-search.openai-native-web-search`, and `plugins.web-search-and-fetch` are fulfilled; `runtime.hosted-tool-use` is covered as secondary evidence.

Observed result after fix: Focused tests passed across tooling, e2e, and extension-qa Vitest shards; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: The live Docker lanes `test:docker:openai-chat-tools`, `test:docker:openai-web-search-minimal`, and `test:docker:openwebui` were not run locally.
target.author: romneyda
